nasb.text: For if we have become united with Him in the likeness of His death, certainly we shall also be in the likeness of His resurrection,

esv.text: For if we have been united with him in a death like his, we shall certainly be united with him in a resurrection like his.

cnv.text: 我們若在他死的樣式上與他聯合，也要在他復活的樣式上與他聯合。

ccb.text: 如果我们和基督一同死了，也必和祂一同复活。

csbs.text: 就是说，如果我们在基督死的样式上与他联合，也将要在他复活的形式上与他联合。
